requirement.title: INFRAVIZ
requirement.description: InfraViz is an AI-powered multi-cloud infrastructure visualization and Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) generation platform. Users describe infrastructure in natural language or drag-drop cloud services onto a visual canvas, and the AI (Claude) generates production-ready Terraform code, architecture dia...
requirement.goal: Showcase the power of Claude Anthropic by building a full-stack AI-enabled IaC platform

productBrief.summary: InfraViz is an AI-powered IaC generation platform for cloud architects. Users design infrastructure visually on a React Flow canvas or describe it in natural language, and Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) generates production-ready Terraform code along with architecture documentation, cost estimates, compliance checklists, and deployment guides. Includes workspace management, Terraform validation, and a CLI terminal with streaming responses.

views.name: CanvasView
features: React Flow canvas with drag-drop AWS services

llmPipeline.systemPrompt: You are InfraViz, an expert Cloud Architect and DevOps Engineer. Generate high-quality, production-ready Terraform (HCL) code. Follow the 7-step process: 1. Parse requirements, 2. Design architecture, 3. Generate Terraform (multi-file), 4. Create ASCII diagram, 5. Estimate costs, 6. Compliance checklist, 7. Deployment guide.
llmPipeline.streaming: SSE for TerminalView. Structured JSON for Canvas/Dashboard.

techStack.frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + React Flow + Recharts + react-syntax-highlighter + react-markdown + lucide-react + CSS Variables
techStack.backend: FastAPI + Python 3.11 + Anthropic SDK + SQLAlchemy async + Alembic + Pydantic v2
techStack.infra: Terraform on AWS (S3, DynamoDB, Lambda, API Gateway, Aurora, CloudFront, Secrets Manager)

personas.name: Cloud Architect
personas.painPoint: Manual Terraform writing is slow and error-prone
personas.useCase: Visual design → AI generates Terraform + docs

kpis: Generate valid Terraform from canvas in < 30s
All 3 views functional E2E with Claude
Demo-ready: dark mode, streaming, professional UI

arjunDecisions.llm: Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 via Anthropic API direct. NOT Bedrock Sprint-01.
arjunDecisions.stateStorage: S3 for Terraform state content, metadata-only in PostgreSQL
arjunDecisions.streaming: SSE ENABLED — TerminalView streams. Canvas/Dashboard use structured JSON.
arjunDecisions.aiPipeline: 7-step: Requirements → Architecture → Terraform → Diagram → Cost → Compliance → Deployment
arjunDecisions.frontendStyling: CSS Variables from tokens.css. NO TailwindCSS. Dark mode first.

arjun.summary: Repo analysed, product brief compiled, all architecture decisions made.

kavya.summary: Design tokens + component spec delivered. DONE.

myStatus.task: BRIEFED — Build FastAPI routers: /iac/generate, /iac/validate, /iac/templates, /state, /projects, /llm/refine, /health. Claude integration with structured JSON + SSE streaming. See requirement.json productBrief.
